text: 99% of you are about to fail the
following test. But I promise you, it's
not your fault. There is so much going
on in the world around us at all times.
And the only way that we were able to
survive as a species was for our brains
to ruthlessly filter out any unnecessary
sensory information. And when your
ancient ancestors were out hunting or
avoiding predators, paying attention to
every leaf, shadow, [music] or cloud
would have completely overwhelmed them.
But has the modern world ruined our
ability to focus? To test this, I want
you to pay attention to how many passes
the white team makes.
If you were able to keep your focus and
count the 13 passes that the white team
made, then congratulations. But did your
brain filter out the moonwalking bear?
Might have to look again.
